title: VPN ACCESS NODE
subtitle: Choose a healthy location, import your config, and keep the private tunnel ready across all devices.

config.description: Use the subscription URL first. It keeps clients synced when routes, credentials, or stealth profiles rotate.

empty.missing_config: The backend has not returned a config yet. Retry after provisioning finishes or check the subscription state.
empty.missing_profile: Profile data is unavailable, so the user-scoped config cannot be requested.
empty.missing_service: Service access is not fully provisioned yet. Finish plan activation or device delivery first.
empty.not_found: The upstream subscription record was not found for this account.

config.title: One-tap VPN import
config.downloadNote: The file is generated only in your browser from the active delivery payload.
config.safeDelivery: Full values are hidden on screen. Use copy, QR, or download only on a trusted device.

copy.error: Clipboard copy failed. Use the visible link manually.
copy.unavailable: Clipboard is unavailable in this browser.

dpi.description: Current public resistance model: {version}. Use it as a signal, not a guarantee, because DPI conditions change by network.
dpi.empty: DPI score is not available right now.
dpi.title: Network resilience signal

guide.description: The safe path is import, choose the recommended region, then verify the connection before switching sensitive traffic.

choose.body: Start with the recommended node. If speed drops, pick another online node with lower load.
choose.title: Choose region

import.body: Copy the subscription URL into your VPN client so future server and credential rotations stay automatic.
import.title: Import config

verify.body: Reconnect and confirm the client shows an active tunnel before using private workflows.
verify.title: Verify tunnel

guide.title: Connection playbook

recommended.customerSafeReason: The customer view shows route readiness only. Operator load, traffic, inbound, online-user, and node-version metrics stay out of the public cabinet.
recommended.description: Recommendation is based on whether a route is usable for this account. Operational scoring details stay in admin tooling.
recommended.empty: No VPN nodes are available for recommendation.
recommended.title: Best node for this session

servers.description: Customer-safe route inventory. It exposes availability and import guidance, not operator load, traffic, online-user, inbound, or node-version metrics.
servers.empty: No servers returned from the backend.
servers.title: Available private routes
